rules.rule_text:
title: Suspicious BlackCat-Related Exfiltration Command
id: 613624be-dabf-4562-b49b-c2fd45773556
status: experimental
description: Detects process execution of RClone or similar tools used by ransomware
  operators to exfiltrate data.
references:
- https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/blog/2022/06/13/the-many-lives-of-blackcat-ransomware/
- https://rclone.org/docs/
author: Micah Babinski
date: 2022/12/04
tags:
- attack.exfiltration
- attack.t1020
- attack.t1537
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - copy
    - --max-age
    - --ignore-existing
    - --multi-thread-streams
    - --transfers
    CommandLine|contains:
    - ftp
    - ssh
    - -q
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Legitimate use of rclone to manage files on cloud storage.
level: high
